bibliographic_info.title: Integration of GNSS Galileo High accuracy service, BDS-3 PPP-B2b and INS for precise positioning in challenging environments

grounding_quotes: <!-- PAGE: 1 -->  Measurement 272 (2026) 121146 Contents lists available at ScienceDirect Measurement journal homepage: www.elsevier.com/locate/measurement IntegrationofGNSSGalileoHighaccuracyservice,BDS-3PPP-B2bandINS forprecisepositioninginchallengingenvironments Sizhe Shena,b , Xiaoming Wanga,c ,∗, Jinglei Zhanga,b, Haobo Lid , Hongxin Zhanga,b, Dingyi Liua,b, Zhe Lia,b, Hong Yuana,c aAerospace

Keywords: High accuracy service PPP-B2b mainly serves the Asia–Pacific region and provides corrections for BDS-3 and GPS, whereas Galileo HAS targets global coverage and supports Galileo and GPS, although its service is not yet fully guaranteed in PPP-B2b PPP some regions.
